TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKPixmap extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: Pairs with actual pixels and rowbytes.
Docs.remarks: This class does not try to manage the lifetime of the pixel memory (nor the color table if provided).

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPixmap ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Creates an empty instance of .

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPixmap (SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo info, IntPtr addr);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo info, native int addr) cil managed

Docs.param: The image information of the pixels.
The memory address of the pixels.
Docs.summary: Creates an instance of .

MemberSignature.Value: public SKPixmap (SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo info, IntPtr addr, int rowBytes);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo info, native int addr, int32 rowBytes) cil managed

Docs.param: The image information of the pixels.
The memory address of the pixels.
The number of bytes per row.
Docs.summary: Creates an instance of .

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKAlphaType AlphaType { get; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKAlphaType AlphaType

Docs.summary: Gets the alpha type.
Docs.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the alpha type.

MemberSignature.Value: public int BitShiftPerPixel { get; }
.property instance int32 BitShiftPerPixel

Docs.summary: Gets the bit shift value per pixel.

MemberSignature.Value: public int BytesPerPixel { get; }
.property instance int32 BytesPerPixel

Docs.summary: Gets the number of bytes per pixel.
Docs.value: The number of bytes per pixel.

MemberSignature.Value: public int BytesSize { get; }
.property instance int32 BytesSize

Docs.summary: Gets the total number of bytes needed to store the pixel data.
Docs.value: The total number of bytes needed to store the pixel data.

MemberSignature.Value: public long BytesSize64 { get; }
.property instance int64 BytesSize64

Docs.summary: Gets the total byte size as a 64-bit integer.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace? ColorSpace { get; }
.property instance class SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace ColorSpace

Docs.summary: Gets the color space.
Docs.value: The color space, or if the pixmap has no color space.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColorType ColorType { get; }
.property instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorType ColorType

Docs.summary: Gets the color type.
Docs.value: One of the enumeration values that specifies the color type.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ComputeIsOpaque ();
.method public hidebysig instance bool ComputeIsOpaque() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns whether all pixels are opaque.
Docs.returns: Returns if all pixels are opaque.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void DisposeManaged ();
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DisposeManaged() cil managed

Docs.summary: Releases managed resources.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void DisposeNative ();
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DisposeNative() cil managed

Docs.summary: Implemented by derived types to destroy any native objects.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKJpegEncoderOptions options);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKData Encode(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKJpegEncoderOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The options to use when creating the encoder.
Docs.summary: Encodes the pixmap as a JPEG.
Docs.returns: Returns the wrapping the encoded pixmap.

Docs.returns: Returns the wrapping the encoded pixmap.

The quality level to use for the pixmap.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKEncodedImageFormat encoder, int quality);
.method public hidebysig instance bool Encode(class System.IO.Stream dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKEncodedImageFormat encoder, int32 quality) cil managed

Docs.param: The destination stream.
The encoded image format.
The encoding quality (0-100).
Docs.summary: Encodes the pixmap to the stream using the specified format and quality.
Docs.returns: Returns on success.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Erase (SkiaSharp.SKColor color);
.method public hidebysig instance bool Erase(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor color) cil managed

Docs.param: The color to fill.
Docs.summary: Fill the entire pixmap with the specified color.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were changed, otherwise .
Docs.remarks: If the pixmap's color type does not support alpha (e.g. 565) then the alpha of the color is ignored (treated as opaque). If the color type only supports alpha (e.g. A1 or A8) then the color's R, G, B components are ignored.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Erase (SkiaSharp.SKColorF color);
.method public hidebysig instance bool Erase(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF color) cil managed

Docs.param: The color to fill.
Docs.summary: Fills the entire pixmap with the specified color.
Docs.returns: Returns if pixels were changed.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Erase (SkiaSharp.SKColor color, SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset);
.method public hidebysig instance bool Erase(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor color, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset) cil managed

Docs.param: The color to fill.
The subset of the pixmap to fill.
Docs.summary: Fill the entire pixmap with the specified color.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were changed, otherwise .
Docs.remarks: If the pixmap's color type does not support alpha (e.g. 565) then the alpha of the color is ignored (treated as opaque). If the color type only supports alpha (e.g. A1 or A8) then the color's R, G, B components are ignored.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool Erase (SkiaSharp.SKColorF color, SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset);
.method public hidebysig instance bool Erase(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF color, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset) cil managed

Docs.param: The color to fill.
The subset area to fill/process.
Docs.summary: Fills a subset of the pixmap with the specified color.
Docs.returns: Returns if pixels were changed.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKPixmap? ExtractSubset (SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset);
.method public hidebysig instance class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap ExtractSubset(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounds of the pixmap subset to retrieve.
Docs.summary: Creates a new which is a subset of this pixmap.
Docs.returns: Returns a subset of the pixmap.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ExtractSubset (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap result, SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset);
.method public hidebysig instance bool ExtractSubset(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap result, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRectI subset) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixmap to store the subset pixels.
The bounds of the pixmap subset to retrieve.
Docs.summary: Creates a new which is a subset of this pixmap.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were read, or if there was an error.

MemberSignature.Value: public float GetPixelAlpha (int x, int y);
.method public hidebysig instance float32 GetPixelAlpha(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate.
The y-coordinate.
Docs.summary: Gets the alpha value of the pixel at the specified coordinates.
Docs.returns: The alpha value (0.0 to 1.0).

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColor GetPixelColor (int x, int y);
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor GetPixelColor(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The column index, zero or greater, and less than the pixmap width.
The row index, zero or greater, and less than the pixmap height.
Docs.summary: Returns the color of the pixel at the specified coordinates.
Docs.returns: Returns the color of the pixel.

MemberSignature.Value: public SkiaSharp.SKColorF GetPixelColorF (int x, int y);
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF GetPixelColorF(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate.
The y-coordinate.
Docs.summary: Gets the color of the pixel at the specified coordinates as an SKColorF.
Docs.returns: The color of the pixel.

MemberSignature.Value: public IntPtr GetPixels ();
.method public hidebysig instance native int GetPixels() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the memory address of the pixels.
Docs.returns: The memory address of the pixel data.

MemberSignature.Value: public IntPtr GetPixels (int x, int y);
.method public hidebysig instance native int GetPixels(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The column index, zero or greater, and less than the pixmap width.
The row index, zero or greater, and less than the pixmap height.
Docs.summary: Returns the memory address of the pixels at (x, y).
Docs.returns: The memory address of the pixel at the specified location.

MemberSignature.Value: public Span<byte> GetPixelSpan ();
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype System.Span`1<unsigned int8> GetPixelSpan() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns a span that wraps the pixel data.
Docs.returns: Returns the span.
Docs.remarks: This span is only valid as long as the pixmap is valid

MemberSignature.Value: public Span<byte> GetPixelSpan (int x, int y);
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype System.Span`1<unsigned int8> GetPixelSpan(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate.
The y-coordinate.
Docs.summary: Gets a span starting at the specified pixel coordinates.
Docs.returns: A span of pixel data.

MemberSignature.Value: public Span<T> GetPixelSpan<T> () where T : struct;
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype System.Span`1<!!T> GetPixelSpan<struct .ctor (class System.ValueType) T>() cil managed

Docs.summary: Gets a typed span of all pixel data.
Docs.returns: A span of pixel data.

MemberSignature.Value: public Span<T> GetPixelSpan<T> (int x, int y) where T : struct;
.method public hidebysig instance valuetype System.Span`1<!!T> GetPixelSpan<struct .ctor (class System.ValueType) T>(int32 x, int32 y) cil managed

Docs.param: The x-coordinate.
The y-coordinate.
Docs.summary: Gets a typed span starting at the specified coordinates.
Docs.returns: A span of pixel data.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ReadPixels (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap);
.method public hidebysig instance bool ReadPixels(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixmap to read the pixel data into.
Docs.summary: Copies the pixels from the image into the specified pixmap.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were read, or if there was an error.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ReadPixels (SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo dstInfo, IntPtr dstPixels, int dstRowBytes);
.method public hidebysig instance bool ReadPixels(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo dstInfo, native int dstPixels, int32 dstRowBytes) cil managed

Docs.param: The image information describing the destination pixel buffer.
The pixel buffer to read the pixel data into.
The number of bytes in each row of in the destination buffer.
Docs.summary: Copies the pixels from the image into the specified buffer.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were read, or if there was an error.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ReadPixels (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, int srcX, int srcY);
.method public hidebysig instance bool ReadPixels(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, int32 srcX, int32 srcY) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixmap to read the pixel data into.
The source x-coordinate to start reading from.
The source y-coordinate to start reading from.
Docs.summary: Copies the pixels from the image into the specified pixmap.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were read, or if there was an error.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool ReadPixels (SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo dstInfo, IntPtr dstPixels, int dstRowBytes, int srcX, int srcY);
.method public hidebysig instance bool ReadPixels(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKImageInfo dstInfo, native int dstPixels, int32 dstRowBytes, int32 srcX, int32 srcY) cil managed

Docs.param: The image information describing the destination pixel buffer.
The pixel buffer to read the pixel data into.
The number of bytes in each row of in the destination buffer.
The source x-coordinate to start reading from.
The source y-coordinate to start reading from.
Docs.summary: Copies the pixels from the image into the specified buffer.
Docs.returns: Returns if the pixels were read, or if there was an error.

The number of bytes per row.

Docs.summary: Scales pixels to the destination using default sampling.
Docs.returns: Returns on success.

.method public hidebysig instance bool ScalePixels(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap destination, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFilterQuality quality) cil managed

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("Use ScalePixels(SKPixmap destination, SKSamplingOptions sampling) instead.", true)]

Docs.param: To be added.
To be added.
Docs.summary: To be added.
Docs.returns: To be added.
